item.title: Contact
item.description:
Feel free to reach out:

  • 💬 Telegram: @your_username
  • 💸 Support me: Patreon
  • 📧 Email: you@example.com

I’m open to collaboration, questions, or freelance work.

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m Zeus Ricote, an independent cybersecurity researcher and bug bounty hunter.

My expertise lies in:

  • Automating reconnaissance and vulnerability discovery
  • Developing reliable pentesting tools
  • Crafting custom exploits for real-world targets
  • Sharing knowledge with the community

This site is my personal lab and journal — a place to share my projects, findings, and tools with fellow security enthusiasts.

Let’s push boundaries and raise the bar in ethical hacking.

item.title: Welcome to the Lab of Zeus Ricote
item.description:
If you’re here, you’re looking for real-deal cyber tools and pentesting insights — no fluff, no hype.

I’m Zeus Ricote, a bug bounty hunter and pentester who builds tools and techniques that actually work in the wild.

This blog isn’t just a diary — it’s a toolbox, a battle manual, and a gateway to everything I create to help you level up your hacking game:

  • Custom recon scripts that save hours
  • Exploit payloads tuned for maximum impact
  • Walkthroughs from real engagements, raw and unfiltered
  • Privacy tips and tools
  • CTFs
  • Study Materials

I don’t do theory — I share what i have tested or created myself. If you want to support the grind and get exclusive access, hit up my Patreon.
